channel.title: Letting-Go on PostDoc Problems
channel.description: Recent content in Letting-Go on PostDoc Problems

item.title: Minimal Setting
item.description: I have a theory about what meditation practice aims to achieve by urging us to “let go”. I believe consciousness or awareness is the bare minimum state of mind required to function. It’s like the OS kernel (or is the BIOS) that loads when your computer starts, before any other program is loaded in working memory. It’s the smallest piece of software necessary to indicate that your mind has booted up.
